title: News
desc: The host presents the latest news stories and developments pertaining to various political and socio-economic issues around the country.

title: Vidiyale Vaa
desc: The host provides information on various trending topics related to fitness, technology, finance, society, economy and culture and interviews experts on them.

title: Snehithiye
desc: The host engages in discussions on topics related to women's issues, along with home and lifestyle tips.

title: Azhagi
desc: Sundari, a widow, raises her three children, Natraj, Mathi and Surya with love and support amidst several hardships. But, things turn bad in the family when Natraj gets married to a rich girl.

title: Nadhaswaram
desc: Gopi, the owner of a tailor shop and son of Chokkalingam, a Nadaswaram player, goes about his daily life, with several ups and downs, along with his family.

title: Kolangal
desc: Mega Series of Abinaya, an ambitious woman, strives to succeed in life. However, things take a turn when her half brother, Aadhi, thwarts her efforts and tries to ruin her.

title: Thendral
desc: A young girl named Thulasi dreams of continuing her education despite living with a middle-class family that shuns her.

title: Sathru
desc: Prabhakaran kidnaps children and demands a ransom from their parents to fund his lifestyle. After the death of a child at his hands, Kathiresan, a policeman, sets out to bring him to justice.

title: Unmai Vellum
desc: The host welcomes diverse guests, facilitating in-depth conversations on a wide spectrum of social topics, exploring various perspectives.

title: News
desc: The host presents the latest news stories and developments pertaining to various political and socio-economic issues around the country.

title: Sillunu Oru Kaadhal
desc: After reading her husband's old diary, a wife learns about his intense college romance, prompting her to reevaluate their seemingly perfect life together.

title: Thillu Mullu
desc: Talented comedians perform hilarious, theme-based skits centred around relatable daily struggles that leave the audience in splits.

title: News
desc: The host presents the latest news stories and developments pertaining to various political and socio-economic issues around the country.

title: Katrathu Samayal
desc: The host presents a wide range of delicious recipes, demonstrates their preparation and shares useful culinary tips with the viewers.

title: Priyamanavale
desc: A devoted wife, misunderstood by her family, rises with strength to reclaim her dignity and rebuild her life.

title: Gauri
desc: A girl blessed by the goddess Masani lives in the village where two landlords belonging there plan to kill her for their benefit.

title: Kalyana Parisu
desc: Kalyana Parisu Season 2 is a village family romance and revenge story centered on Vidhya and Ashok, who, after marrying due to unexpected circumstances, navigate life together amidst family conflicts.

title: Angadi Theru
desc: Jyothi Lingam, a bright student, leads a happy life in his small village. One day, tragedy strikes when his father, the only earning member of the family, dies in an accident.
